title: In-Flight Promise Deduplication, Waiters, Abort Ownership, and Cleanup · Type-System Trace: Pokedex Ts Inflight Key
summary: Concurrent misses create duplicate fetches, a shared promise retains one caller signal, first cancellation rejects all waiters, and settled entries remain in the in-flight map. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts inflight key increment in waiter-aware duplicate-suppressed async loader. Learners progress through prediction, ex…
objectives: Use the canonical resource key to register exactly one controlled load separate from the completed-value cache.
Bound entries and approximate bytes, implement deterministic eviction policy, and expose hit, miss, stale, eviction, bypass, and load decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
